basis: Synthetic hand-worked example (see BASIS.md, calc 0.2.0 section). NOT an FTA-certified figure; regression anchor only. Pins vrm_v0/vrh_v0 CALC_VERSION 0.2.0 (gap policy: per-group exclusion + coverage, handoff 0002) over the SAME fixture.json as the 0.1.0 expectations.

default_coverage_threshold.comment: Full fixture at the DEFAULT coverage_threshold 0.95 (an engineering placeholder, not an FTA number): trip-C is excluded (warning), coverage 2/3 < 0.95, so both calcs refuse with ONE blocking coverage_below_threshold finding and value null. Nothing is persisted.

lowered_coverage_threshold.comment: Full fixture with an EXPLICIT coverage_threshold 0.5: coverage 2/3 >= 0.5, so the gapped trip-C group is excluded (one warning finding citing all four rec-c records) and the figure equals the clean-group values. input_record_ids cover included groups ONLY.
